MINI MINUTES FOR AUG-15-2022 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF DEBT MANAGEMENT PARTNERS, LLC'S, UNOPPOSED "MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO WRITTEN STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES" IS GRANTED. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING AND STATES THAT THE MOTION WAS NOT OPPOSED. Motion For Entry Of Judgment (Motions)
Off Calendar Aug-15-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF DEBT MANAGEMENT PARTNERS, LLC'S, Motion For Entry Of Judgment.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion for entry of judgment pursuant to written stipulation of all parties" is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling and states that the motion was not opposed in compliance with CRC3.1312.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
